title: Cr7 Cybernetic Football Campaign Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cr7 Cybernetic Football Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Epic cybernetic football campaign poster built around Cristiano Ronaldo in Portugal red national team kit, number 7, one human side of the face and one advanced metallic Terminator-style machine side with glowing red robotic eye, and foreground Ronaldo dribbling a football with captain armband visible, dynamic motion blur, and explosive energy trails. Subject: Cristiano Ronaldo in Portugal red national team kit, number 7 appears as a futuristic cybernetic warrior: one side human with ultra-realistic skin and sharp jawline, the other side revealing advanced metallic Terminator-style machinery with a glowing red robotic eye. Scene: dark crimson stadium background filled with smoke, sparks, energy particles, stadium lights, red lightning, subtle futuristic circuits, and shattered fragments creates the dark crimson stadium-cyberpunk atmosphere with smoke, sparks, energy particles, stadium lights, Portugal elements, circuits, glitch effects, and shattered fragments. Composition: foreground Ronaldo dribbling a football with captain armband visible, dynamic motion blur, and explosive energy trails; fixed layered sports poster with massive heroic portrait in the background, foreground Ronaldo in dribbling motion, captain armband visible, explosive energy trails, and integrated typography. Signature Elements: Portugal flag elements, national team crest, number 7 kit, championship aura, and Nike commercial aesthetic stay visible through Portugal flag elements, national team crest, number 7 kit, captain armband, cybernetic circuits, glitch effects, and championship aura. Style: Ultra-detailed hyper-real sports advertising campaign, premium sports magazine cover style, Nike commercial aesthetic, Behance-trending graphic design, cinematic Photoshop poster art, HDR sharp focus, and 8K finish. Color Palette: Fixed deep red, black, metallic silver, glowing crimson, Portugal red kit, dark shadows, sparks, red lightning, and cybernetic machinery highlights. Lighting: Dramatic cinematic lighting with volumetric fog, high-contrast shadows, red robotic eye glow, metallic edge highlights, stadium backlight, and explosive crimson energy trails. Camera: Layered vertical poster composition with close heroic portrait depth, foreground action pose, motion blur around the dribble, crisp face and kit details, and strong campaign hierarchy. Typography: CR7, THE TERMINATOR, THE MACHINE NEVER STOPS must appear as massive integrated poster typography with CR7, THE TERMINATOR, and THE MACHINE NEVER STOPS readable inside the design. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
